case_title: SYLVIA CHAVEZ VS. JOHN DOE 1 et al

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR AUG-25-2003 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE JUL-11-2003 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - NON-VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHAVEZ, SYLVIA AS TO DEFENDANT JOHN DOE 1 JOHN DOE 2 JOHN DOE 3 JOHN DOE 4 JOHN DOE 5 DOES 6 TO 300,INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR JUL-11-2003 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  APR-14-2003 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         JUN-26-2003
RESPONSE TO OSC RE: FAILURE TO PROVIDE PROOF OF SERVICE FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHAVEZ, SYLVIA
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF AUG-25-2003 IS OFF CALENDAR DISMISSAL FILED. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
SUBSTITUTION OF ATTORNEY: ALEXANDER, MARY SUBSTITUTED FOR SIMONS, RICHARD JAY AS ATTORNEY FOR CHAVEZ, SYLVIA
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE
